de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml

Class LabeledParserRuleContext

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml.LabeledParserRuleContext

  • public class LabeledParserRuleContext
extends java.lang.Object
    This class maps a ParserRuleContext to a TermLabel.
